memoryArtifacts.headline:
John Cowper [Cooper]
(1454 – 6 February 1502)
memoryArtifacts.description:
His wife's name was Joan.

They had: Thomas Cooper; Michael Cooper; a daughter who married Edmund Emery.

John Cooper, yeoman of Arlesey, Bedfordshire England wrote his will on 21st day, 7th month 150 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Deol Michael Cowper於1450年出生在英國貝德福爾斯特亞特利 煙雨 沙時，他的父親Sir William Lord Cooper50歲，母親Magdalen Jernemyth Aleyn40歲。他於1465年6月5日與Joan Stanbridge在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1501年2月在英國英格蘭貝德福爾阿爾享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾阿爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Deol Michael Cowper于1450年出生在英国貝德福爾斯特亞特利 煙雨 沙时，他的父亲Sir William Lord Cooper50岁，母亲Magdalen Jernemyth Aleyn40岁。他于1465年6月5日与Joan Stanbridge在英国英格兰韋斯特 素可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1501年2月在英国英格兰貝德福爾阿爾享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾阿爾。

nameMeanings.name: Deol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Deol Michael Cowper was born in 1450, in Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Sir William Lord Cooper, was 50 and his mother, Magdalen Jernemyth Aleyn, was 40. He married Joan Stanbridge on 5 June 1465, in West Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died in February 1501, in Arlesey, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Arlesey, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Deol Michael Cowper est né en 1450, à Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Lord Cooper, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Magdalen Jernemyth Aleyn, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Joan Stanbridge le 5 juin 1465, à West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en février 1501, à Arlesey, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Arlesey, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Deol Michael Cowper 1450 in Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Lord Cooper 50 und seine Mutter Magdalen Jernemyth Aleyn 40. Er hat am 5. Juni 1465 in West Sussex, England, United Kingdom Joan Stanbridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Februar 1501 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Arlesey, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Arlesey, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Deol Michael Cowper è nato il nel 1450 nel Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Lord Cooper, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Magdalen Jernemyth Aleyn, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Joan Stanbridge il 5 giugno 1465, nel West Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Deol Michael Cowperが1450年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアストレアトリー ウィス シャルペンhオで生まれた時，父Sir William Lord Cooperは50歳，母Magdalen Jernemyth Aleynは40歳であった。1465年6月5日にイギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスでJoan Stanbridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1501年2月にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアアルレセイで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアアルレセイにて埋葬された。

ko.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Deol Michael Cowper(이)가 1450년 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Lord Cooper(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Magdalen Jernemyth Aleyn(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1465년 6월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스에서 Joan Stanbridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1501년 2월 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 알레시에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 알레시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Deol Michael Cowper nasceu em 1450, em Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Lord Cooper, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Magdalen Jernemyth Aleyn, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Stanbridge em 5 de junho de 1465, em West Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em fevereiro de 1501, em Arlesey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Arlesey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: шарпено, стритли вит шарпено, бедфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Deol Michael Cowper родился в 1450 г. в местности стритли вит шарпено, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Lord Cooper было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Magdalen Jernemyth Aleyn, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Stanbridge 5 июня 1465 г. в местности вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер февраль 1501 г. в местности арльси, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности арльси, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan Stanbridge el 5 de junio de 1465, en West Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en febrero de 1501, en Arlesey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Arlesey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
